Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-31 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long Today's data shows LINC decisively dominating the long-term momentum ranking with a score of 95.5 and rank #1, driven by exceptional returns across all timeframes—particularly a 1,445.77% return over 10 years and 506.18% over 5 years. LINC demonstrates clean momentum signals with all four SMA thresholds passed and outperformance versus SPY by 139.72% over 1 year and 1,236.93% over 10 years, indicating consistent secular strength. In contrast, CLMT shows a critical structural weakness: while it matches LINC's strong performance in the 1-5 year windows (160.52% and 563.64% respectively), it collapses dramatically with only 160.91% return over 10 years and significant underperformance versus SPY (-47.94%) and QQQ (-257.02%) at the decade mark. This 10-year deterioration in CLMT (ratio_10y_5y of just 0.29 versus LINC's 2.86) suggests the company either changed fundamentally, faced secular headwinds, or entered a maturity/decline phase after earlier strength. The stark contrast between these two top candidates illustrates how shorter-term momentum can mask
